title: Staub Cast Iron Tealight Holder / Plate Warmer – Rare
description:
Original Staub cast iron tealight holder designed to keep plates or small dishes warm using candle heat. A practical and elegant table accessory, perfect for dinners, fondue evenings, or special occasions.
Details:
Brand: Staub
Material: Cast iron
Color: Black
Capacity: Holds 3 tealight candles
Use: Plate or dish warmer
Condition: Used, in good shape
The heavy cast iron retains heat well and provides a stable base for keeping food warm at the table. This is a rare Staub product that is not easy to find.
